craft_subjects.context: Approved storyboard/video-plan context for each shot/transition.
craft_subjects.references: Selected first/last frames, avatar refs, motion refs, audio refs, and exact take/ignore rules.
craft_subjects.action: Write provider-neutral video request prompts from selected refs only.
craft_subjects.focus: Shot priority: identity lock, motion, transition, final-frame continuity, or audio sync.
craft_subjects.timing: Shot duration/phase only if already defined by storyboard/video workflow or source audio; no arbitrary defaults.
